heading: Commission oversight of the Board
label: 7217 Commission oversight of the Board

children.heading: General oversight responsibility
children.label: a General oversight responsibility
children.text: The Commission shall have oversight and enforcement authority over the Board, as provided in this Act. The provisions of , and of shall apply to the Board as fully as if the Board were a “registered securities association” for purposes of those sections 78q(a)(1) and 78q(b)(1).section 78q(a)(1) of this titlesection 78q(b)(1) of this title

children.heading: Definition
children.label: 1 Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “proposed rule” means any proposed rule of the Board, and any modification of any such rule.

children.heading: Prior approval required
children.label: 2 Prior approval required
children.text: No rule of the Board shall become effective without prior approval of the Commission in accordance with this section, other than as provided in with respect to initial or transitional standards.section 7213(a)(3)(B) of this title

children.heading: Approval criteria
children.label: 3 Approval criteria
children.text: The Commission shall approve a proposed rule, if it finds that the rule is consistent with the requirements of this Act and the securities laws, or is necessary or appropriate in the public interest or for the protection of investors.

children.label: A
children.text: the phrase “consistent with the requirements of this chapter and the rules and regulations thereunder applicable to such organization” in shall be deemed to read “consistent with the requirements of title I of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002, and the rules and regulations issued thereunder applicable to such organization, or as necessary or appropriate in the public interest or for the protection of investors”; andsection 78s(b)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the phrase “otherwise in furtherance of the purposes of this chapter” in shall be deemed to read “otherwise in furtherance of the purposes of title I of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002”.section 78s(b)(3)(C) of this title

children.heading: Commission authority to amend rules of the Board
children.label: 5 Commission authority to amend rules of the Board
children.text: The provisions of shall govern the abrogation, deletion, or addition to portions of the rules of the Board by the Commission as fully as if the Board were a “registered securities association” for purposes of that section 78s(c), except that the phrase “to conform its rules to the requirements of this chapter and the rules and regulations thereunder applicable to such organization, or otherwise in furtherance of the purposes of this chapter” in shall, for purposes of this paragraph, be deemed to read “to assure the fair administration of the Public Company Accounting Oversight Board, conform the rules promulgated by that Board to the requirements of title I of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002, or otherwise further the purposes of that Act, the securities laws, and the rules and regulations thereunder applicable to that Board”.section 78s(c) of this titlesection 78s(c) of this title

children.heading: Commission review of disciplinary action taken by the Board
children.label: c Commission review of disciplinary action taken by the Board

children.heading: Notice of sanction
children.label: 1 Notice of sanction
children.text: The Board shall promptly file notice with the Commission of any final sanction on any registered public accounting firm or on any associated person thereof, in such form and containing such information as the Commission, by rule, may prescribe.

children.label: A
children.text: (rather than that section 78s(d)(2)) shall govern the extent to which application for, or institution by the Commission on its own motion of, review of any disciplinary action of the Board operates as a stay of such action;section 7215(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: references in that section 78s(e)(1) to “members” of such an organization shall be deemed to be references to registered public accounting firms;

children.label: C
children.text: the phrase “consistent with the purposes of this chapter” in that section 78s(e)(1) shall be deemed to read “consistent with the purposes of this chapter and title I of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002”;

children.label: D
children.text: references to rules of the Municipal Securities Rulemaking Board in that section 78s(e)(1) shall not apply; and

children.label: E
children.text: the reference to shall refer instead to .section 78s(e)(2) of this titlesection 7217(c)(3) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: is not necessary or appropriate in furtherance of this Act or the securities laws; or

children.label: B
children.text: is excessive, oppressive, inadequate, or otherwise not appropriate to the finding or the basis on which the sanction was imposed.

children.heading: Censure of the Board; other sanctions
children.label: d Censure of the Board; other sanctions

children.heading: Rescission of Board authority
children.label: 1 Rescission of Board authority
children.text: The Commission, by rule, consistent with the public interest, the protection of investors, and the other purposes of this Act and the securities laws, may relieve the Board of any responsibility to enforce compliance with any provision of this Act, the securities laws, the rules of the Board, or professional standards.

children.label: A
children.text: has violated or is unable to comply with any provision of this Act, the rules of the Board, or the securities laws; or

children.label: B
children.text: without reasonable justification or excuse, has failed to enforce compliance with any such provision or rule, or any professional standard by a registered public accounting firm or an associated person thereof.

children.heading: Censure of Board members; removal from office
children.label: 3 Censure of Board members; removal from office
A
children.text: has willfully violated any provision of this Act, the rules of the Board, or the securities laws;

children.label: B
children.text: has willfully abused the authority of that member; or

children.label: C
children.text: without reasonable justification or excuse, has failed to enforce compliance with any such provision or rule, or any professional standard by any registered public accounting firm or any associated person thereof.
